text.message: It's been a long time since a video happened
I’m on my phone so can’t video and play at the same time
I will transcribe any of Chris's mistruths
Brian Ill be trading brick for your wood
Patrick you have sheep and aren’t on ore
my first card I've gotten this whole game
You should have seen how the 3s were working for Chris last game
not a single 6 or 10 yet, ridiculous
I need to start building on 3s instead of things like 10s…
That’s very frustrating, wish I had just got an answer so I did t have to discsrd
but he also used some colorful language
I just offered more than that for wheat!
not a single 10, only 1 6 the entire game
Patrick is running away with it
Your eyes are always on hurting me so…
it apparently will tell you if you try to trade
I can't wait to see the dice distribution here
if no one has wheat it won't let you offer
also the bank cards are shown
I don’t have any but will when I do
I have a brick for uou
Patrick will win with any trade
well, eh,  that probably is right
I'll give you a sheep for your brick
Patrick you’ll notice I have done zero antagonistic toward you
That’s called keeping the eyes on the prize
so I think he'll win next turn for sure
At least our trading alliance is working
